title: holosteum glutinosum subsp. liniflorum
intro: Holosteum glutinosum subsp. liniflorum, also known as sticky mouse ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant have been traditionally utilized for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Holosteum glutinosum subsp. liniflorum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
